analytics.name: Google Analytics
analytics.description: Creates pseudonymous statistics on how the shop is used (e.g. pages viewed) so we can improve it. Data is transmitted to Google.

marketing.name: Google Ads
marketing.description: Enables advertising and remarketing as well as measuring ad performance – also on other websites. Data is transmitted to Google.

enhanced.name: Enhanced conversion tracking
enhanced.description: Sends Google encrypted (hashed) data to attribute purchases to ad campaigns more accurately. Data is transmitted to Google.
